case_title: JESSY GONZALEZ VS. MISSION ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AGENCY et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $100.00 - SERVED SEP-24-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AGENCY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, JESSY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MISSION ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AGENCY PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST LUIS GRANADOS IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-11-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-11-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($100.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED SEP-24-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRANADOS, LUIS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,443.97 FILED BY GONZALEZ, JESSY AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AGENCY GRANADOS, LUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO LUIS GRANADOS BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-11-2012 AT 3:30 PM. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST LUIS GRANADOS IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2012 - JUDGMENT.
